message:
Fix array transparency, extract seeker, add dirty input + for-await to both parsers

- Fix isFieldPicked() to skip null (array) slots, making pick paths transparent
  through arrays (e.g. pick: ["users.name"] works on arrays of objects)
- Fix ldStack.pop() on close-bracket when exiting a skip zone
- Extract seeker state machine into reusable createSeeker() factory
- Add dirty input handling to createParser when schema is provided
- Add source + [Symbol.asyncIterator] to createEventParser
- Update README: unified schema-driven streaming section, parser comparison table
- Bump to 0.3.1

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "vectorjson",
-  "version": "0.3.0",
+  "version": "0.3.1",
   "description": "O(n) WASM SIMD JSON parser for AI agents — stream fields instantly, abort errors early, offload parsing to Workers",
   "type": "module",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
